---
title: "Synthetic Disk Simulation"
format:
  html:
    toc: false
    page-layout: full
---

<style>
.simulacion-layout {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: 320px 1fr;
  gap: 1rem;
  margin-top: 1rem;
}

.panel-controles {
  padding: 1rem;
  border: 1px solid #ccc;
  border-radius: 12px;
}

.panel-visual {
  padding: 1rem;
  border: 1px solid #ccc;
  border-radius: 12px;
}

#lienzo-disco {
  width: 100%;
  max-width: 800px;
  height: 500px;
  border: 1px solid #999;
  border-radius: 12px;
  display: block;
  background: #000;
}

#resumen-parametros {
  margin-top: 1rem;
  padding: 0.75rem;
  border: 1px solid #ccc;
  border-radius: 10px;
}
</style>

## Protoplanetary Disk Simulation

This interactive tool will show how changing physical parameters modifies the morphology of a synthetic protoplanetary disk.

<div class="simulacion-layout">
  <div class="panel-controles">
    <h3>Controls</h3>
    <p>The sliders will appear here.</p>

    <div id="contenedor-controles"></div>
  </div>

  <div class="panel-visual">
    <h3>Disk view</h3>

    <canvas id="lienzo-disco" width="800" height="500"></canvas>

    <div id="resumen-parametros">
      <strong>Current model:</strong>
      <p id="texto-parametros">Loading simulation parameters...</p>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<script src="simulation.js"></script>
